landing.heroSub: Control all your motors and shades with a single smart hub.
landing.feature1Desc: Control your motors and shades from anywhere in the world.
landing.feature2Desc: 433.42 MHz RTS protocol compatible with all RTS motors.
landing.feature3Desc: Automatic control with daily and weekly timers.

firmware.title: Firmware Download
firmware.v100changes: Initial release: WiFi management, motor control, RTS protocol, scheduling, MQTT, Luxa Cloud integration.
firmware.v130sec1: SSL/TLS certificate validation for all cloud connections (Supabase, OpenWeatherMap)
firmware.v130sec2: Root CA bundle: ISRG Root X1 + Amazon Root CA 1
firmware.v130perf1: HTML pages served from flash (PROGMEM) — zero heap allocation
firmware.v130perf2: Chunked HTTP responses (2KB) to prevent memory fragmentation
firmware.v130perf3: Eliminates heap fragmentation during long-running operation
firmware.v130summary: v1.3.0 completes the security and stability hardening started in v1.2.0. All 18 firmware analysis issues are now resolved.
firmware.v120summary: Major stability and security update — 16 issues fixed.
firmware.v120fix1: RTS interrupt duration reduced from 320ms to ~71ms
firmware.v120fix2: WiFi async scanning, thread-safe event handling, API auth enforcement
firmware.v120fix3: Motor position tracking with target support, device ID collision fix
firmware.v120fix4: NVS flash wear protection (save every 10 commands), ISO timestamps for cloud sync
firmware.v120fix5: Rate limiting on motor/RTS/WiFi endpoints, CORS headers for local control
firmware.v120fix6: OTA division-by-zero fix, MQTT connect disambiguation, async WiFi scan
firmware.otaNote: OTA (wireless) updates are also supported after initial setup.

setup.title: Setup Guide
setup.step1Desc: Connect your Luxa Core unit to power. On first boot, the device creates a 'Luxa-XXXXXX' WiFi network.
setup.step2Desc: Connect to 'Luxa-XXXXXX' from your phone (password: luxa1234). Select your home WiFi on the setup page.
setup.step3Desc: After WiFi connection, access the control panel at http://luxa.local in your browser.
setup.step4Desc: Go to Luxa Cloud section in the control panel. Scan the QR code or enter the device code at cloud.luxasystem.com.
setup.step5Desc: Add your motor in the Devices section. For RF motors, create a virtual remote and press PROG to pair.

device.title: Device Details
device.name: Device Name
device.removeConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove this device?

addDevice.title: Add New Device
addDevice.step1: Make sure your Luxa Core is powered on and connected to WiFi.
addDevice.step2: Go to the Luxa Cloud section in the device's web interface.
addDevice.step3: Scan the QR code on screen or enter the device code.
addDevice.claimFailed: Could not add device. Check the code.
addDevice.alreadyClaimed: This device is already linked to another account.
addDevice.alreadyYours: This device is already linked to your account.
addDevice.invalidQR: Invalid QR code. Scan the QR from your Luxa device.
addDevice.noBarcodeApi: Your browser doesn't support QR scanning. Please enter the code manually.
addDevice.cameraError: Could not access camera. Please check camera permissions.

profile.title: Profile
profile.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
